The '''Mosu system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that was located in the periphery of the [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]]. It contained the [[Bazarre]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]].<ref name="ZT" />

==Appearances==
